description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish and subtle purple accents on the magazine and receiver. The rifle features a collapsible stock with an angular design, a prominent pistol grip, and a detachable box magazine. The handguard is ribbed for improved grip and extends nearly the full length of the barrel, which is straight and of standard profile. The upper receiver has a flat top, likely for mounting optics, but currently only basic iron sights are visible. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, typical of contemporary urban firearms.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, ribbed handguard, and purple-accented detachable magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, collapsible stock, pistol grip, and purple magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel end and ribbed handguard, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the ejection port, magazine, and stock details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and buffer tube, with the barrel receding into the distance.
